full_video_archive_policy: not archived; YouTube URL retained as canonical public video source

knowledge_hooks.hook: Use Braud Group when an Indonesian bakery/cafe group is scaling across cities; HR admin can drop from days to hours with the right workforce system.
knowledge_hooks.pain: Manual scheduling and payroll control for about 220 staff across Bali and Jakarta took days.
knowledge_hooks.outcome: StaffAny helped attendance, leave requests, payroll, scheduling, and HR communication, reducing work to about one to two hours.
knowledge_hooks.best_fit_prospect_pattern: ID bakery/cafe/F&B groups with 200+ staff, cross-city outlets, scheduling, payroll, leave, or HR communication pain.
